name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Position the barbell on your upper back
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Keep chest up and core tight
Lower down by bending knees and hips
Descend until thighs are parallel to floor
Drive through heels to return to standing
tips: Breathe in on descent, out on ascent

name: Push-ups
instructions: Start in plank position with hands shoulder-width apart
Lower body until chest nearly touches floor
Keep core engaged and body in straight line
Push through palms to return to start
Keep elbows at 45-degree angle from body
tips: Don't let hips sag or pike up

name: Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, toes under bar
Bend at hips and knees to grip bar
Keep back straight, chest up, shoulders back
Drive through heels and extend hips to lift
Stand fully upright with shoulders back
Lower bar with control back to floor
tips: Keep bar close to body throughout
Engage lats to keep bar path straight

name: Pull-ups
instructions: Hang from bar with overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart
Pull body up until chin clears the bar
Focus on pulling elbows down and back
Lower with control to full arm extension
Keep core engaged throughout movement
tips: Imagine pulling the bar to your chest
Full range of motion is key

name: Plank
instructions: Start in forearm position, elbows under shoulders
Extend legs back, balancing on forearms and toes
Keep body in straight line from head to heels
Engage core and glutes
Hold position while breathing normally
tips: Don't let hips sag or rise

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench with dumbbells at chest level
Press dumbbells up until arms are extended
Keep slight bend in elbows at top
Lower dumbbells with control to chest
Keep core engaged and feet flat on floor
tips: Maintain natural arch in lower back

name: Burpees
instructions: Start standing with feet hip-width apart
Drop into squat and place hands on floor
Jump feet back into plank position
Perform a push-up (optional)
Jump feet back to squat position
Jump up explosively with arms overhead
tips: Modify by stepping instead of jumping

name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Start in high plank position
Drive one knee toward chest
Quickly switch legs, extending one back while bringing other forward
Continue alternating legs at quick pace
Keep hips level and core engaged
tips: Don't let hips bounce up and down

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Stand with feet wider than shoulders, kettlebell in front
Hinge at hips to grab kettlebell with both hands
Swing kettlebell back between legs
Drive hips forward explosively to swing kettlebell up
Let momentum carry kettlebell to shoulder height
Control the descent and repeat
tips: Power comes from hips, not arms

name: Lunges
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart
Step forward with one leg
Lower hips until both knees bent at 90 degrees
Keep front knee over ankle
Push through front heel to return to start
Repeat on other leg
tips: Don't let front knee extend past toes
